questions.text: Two days before the exam, Aditya plans his study time. By midnight, he feels his focus fading but the chapter isn’t finished. What choice best supports his exam performance?

options.text: Push through while rereading without focus
Stop, rest well, and continue with a fresh mind

questions.text: The night before a test, Kabir finishes revision early and opens a game to relax. Time passes faster than expected. What decision would help him the next morning?

options.text: Set a clear stop time and protect sleep
Play more and wake up earlier to revise

questions.text: While studying late, Nisha notices she keeps reading the same line again and again. What does this signal about her learning state?

options.text: The topic is impossible to understand
Her brain needs rest to work effectively
She is not capable of doing well

questions.text: Late at night, messages keep arriving on Aarav’s phone while he prepares for an exam. What choice supports steady focus?

options.text: Silence notifications until study is complete
Reply quickly to avoid missing out

questions.text: The project deadline and exam date fall close together. Riya feels pressure to finish everything in one night. What strategy helps her most?

options.text: Complete everything in one long stretch
Focus only on one task and forget the other
Break work across days with rest in between
